description: PageIndex as shipped: native PDF ingestion of RFC 9110 with inferred TOC/section structure and generated node summaries. The PDF (Set C) arm of the RFC 9110 long-document corpus, for the Markdown-vs-PDF representation comparison. Text fidelity is PageIndex's own extraction (uncorrected).

generation.toc_note: PageIndex found no clean page-numbered TOC (page-number path 50% accuracy); it generated a TOC from scratch (~91.7% accuracy) then ran repeated fix_incorrect_toc passes. This TOC-repair loop is the dominant cost on this spec.
generation.build_note: Built via the metered wrapper with the persistent response cache: recorded across a $0.50 record spike + a --resume completion pass (run_id 20260715T022226Z). Realized cost ~$6.44 total; the full pass metered $5.94 of NEW spend (1271 live calls) while replaying 613 calls for $0 (276 from the spike + ~337 intra-run duplicate requests deduped by the content-addressed cache).
generation.cost_calibration: realized ~2.96x the estimate_pdf high estimate ($2.01) — the 2-4x input rule-of-thumb under-predicts TOC-repair-heavy specs (~1 LLM call per structural item).

text_fidelity: uncorrected PageIndex PDF extraction (if_add_node_text=no, so node body text is not stored in this index; structure + summaries only).
